zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg於大約1210年出生時，她的父親Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg22歲，母親Isolda van Limburg22歲。她於大約1233年與Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg在海因里希_海普洛文次海斯格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1267年在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg于大约1210年出生时，她的父亲Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg22岁，母亲Isolda van Limburg22岁。她于大约1233年与Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg在海因里希_海普洛文次海斯格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1267年在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg was born about 1210, her father, Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg, was 22 and her mother, Isolda van Limburg, was 22. She married Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg about 1233, in Heinsberg, Rhineland, Prussia. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1267, in Heinsberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg est née environ 1210, son père, Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isolda van Limburg, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg environ 1233, à Heinsberg, Rhénanie, Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1267, à Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg um 1210 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg 22 und ihre Mutter Isolda van Limburg 22. Sie hat um 1233 in Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1267 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg è nata il circa 1210, sua padre, Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Isolda van Limburg, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg circa 1233, nel Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1267, nel Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes von Kleve-Heinsbergが約1210年に生まれた時，父Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburgは22歳，母Isolda van Limburgは22歳であった。約1233年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズヘインスバーグでHeinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1267年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンヘインスバーグで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg(이)가 대략 1210년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isolda van Limburg(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1233년 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 하인스버그에서 Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 하인스버그에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg nasceu aproximadamente 1210, seu pai, Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isolda van Limburg, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg aproximadamente 1233, em Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1267, em Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg родилась около 1210 г., её отцу по имени Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isolda van Limburg, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg около 1233 г. в местности хаинсбирг, раинпровинз, Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1267 г. в местности хаинсбирг, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes von Kleve-Heinsberg nació aproximadamente 1210, su papá, Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Isolda van Limburg, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Heinrich I. von Sponheim-Heinsberg aproximadamente 1233, en Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1267, en Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 58 años.
